hero_title: Every channel. One place. Zero missed sales.
hero_subtitle: Your conversations and your content, in one place. For sellers, creators, and businesses who were already tired of losing things between tabs.
hero_image_alt: Bonsai dashboard showing unified inbox and content calendar side by side
features_subtitle: You have customer messages in WhatsApp, Instagram, and email. And a content calendar that lives mostly in your intentions. Both problems have a fix. And both fit in one subscription.
feature_1_benefit: Never lose a sale to an unanswered message again.
feature_1_description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and email — all in one place. Respond faster, assign conversations to your team, and stop switching apps every time a notification comes in.
feature_2_benefit: Your social presence, without the Sunday night panic.
feature_2_description: Plan and schedule weeks of posts from a single view — across all your channels. No opening four different apps. No realizing you forgot to post anything.
feature_3_benefit: Professional-grade tools. One price. No dollar conversion required.
feature_3_description: Serious platforms are priced in USD and built for other markets. This one isn't. One subscription, in your currency, with support in your language — and room to grow.
hiw_step_1_details: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email. Everything lands in one place. Yes, including the channel you always forget to check.
hiw_step_2_details: Every message from every channel in one inbox. No more app-switching. No more sales lost to a buried DM.
hiw_step_3_details: Schedule weeks of posts across all your channels from one calendar. Stop posting when you remember. Start posting when it counts.
quote_1: I used to live with three apps open and still miss messages. Now everything lands in one place and I actually respond on time. First week I recovered two sales I would have lost.
quote_2: I was paying for tools that didn't talk to each other and still felt behind. This finally feels like a system, not a workaround.
cta_title: Your inbox and your content calendar are waiting.
cta_subtitle: Start free. No card required. Set up in minutes.
privacy_intro: We take your secrets and put them in a very small box with a lock.
privacy_s1_content: We collect your dreams, your favorite color, and your opinion on pineapples on pizza.
privacy_s2_content: We use this data to train our squirrels for world domination.
privacy_s2_details: Mostly we just use it to send you pictures of llamas.
terms_intro: By using this, you agree to share your snacks with us.
terms_s1_content: Don't be a party pooper. No malarkey allowed (unless it's our malarkey).
terms_s2_content: If you turn into a pumpkin at midnight, it's not our fault.
terms_s2_details: Always carry a spare glass slipper.
cookies_intro: We use chocolate chip and oatmeal raisins to track your crumbs.
cookies_s1_content: Little digital bits that help us remember if you like milk with your cookies.
cookies_s2_content: You can tell us to stop giving you cookies, but you'll be hungry.
cookies_s2_details: We recommend the double fudge ones.
en_only_msg: This is only visible in English!
es_only_msg: This is only visible in Spanish!
